storyEditor.title: Story Editor
storyEditor.description: Create an illustrated sci-fi storybook with AI.
storyEditor.storyTitlePlaceholder: Enter a title for your storybook...
storyEditor.storyIdeaPlaceholder: Describe your sci-fi story idea... (e.g., 'A lone astronaut discovers an ancient alien artifact on Europa')
storyEditor.previewPlaceholder: Your AI-generated storybook will appear here...
storyEditor.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to create stories.
storyEditor.saveFirst: Save the storybook first to publish
storyEditor.enterTitleFirst: Please enter a story title first
storyEditor.enterIdeaFirst: Please enter a story idea first
storyEditor.rememberToSave: Remember to save your storybook to avoid losing your work!
storyEditor.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
